identity.name: TalentAI
identity.aesthetic: Soft Pastel SaaS, Clean, Airy, Modern

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/20 transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

landing_hero.alt: Diverse team collaborating in a modern office
landing_hero.usage: Landing page hero section background or side image

recruiter_dashboard.alt: HR professional reviewing candidate profiles on a laptop
recruiter_dashboard.usage: Feature section showing the dashboard in use

abstract_bg.usage: Background for authentication pages or empty states

team_meeting.alt: Team meeting in a bright office

icons.usage: Use for navigation, actions, and status indicators

widgets: KPI Cards (Total Candidates, Open Jobs, Avg Time to Hire)

job_fit_analysis.layout: Full width table with expandable rows
features: AI Score column with color-coded ring (0-100)

universal_guidelines: Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for all headings to give a modern, friendly feel.
Use 'Manrope' for body text for high legibility.
Maintain a 'Light & Airy' feel. Avoid heavy dark backgrounds. Use white cards on light gray/blue backgrounds.
Use soft shadows (shadow-sm, shadow-md) to create depth without harshness.
Interactive elements should have clear hover states (slight color shift or lift).
Status indicators must use the defined pastel palette (bg-green-100 text-green-800) for accessibility and softness.
All charts should use the pastel color palette defined in tailwind config.
Do not use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0f172a) for text.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
For empty states, use the abstract pastel background image with a centered message and action button.
